title: Ability to Export "Group BY" Boards in Excel (Dynamic Grouping)
excerpt: So Currently a new feature Group By is working great  but the ability to export these groups in the Excel would be Super Awesome.

posts.author: Prajwal (Prajwal Kumar)
posts.cookedHtml:
So Currently a new feature Group By is working great but the ability to export these groups in the Excel would be Super Awesome.

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! I am finding using the group by for a text column was looking great, then tried exporting and it doesn’t work either.

Are there any grouped by this would work for?
